title: DSA using Java
quote: Building strong problem-solving foundations through Java and Data Structures.
story: A multi-phase workshop series introducing students to Data Structures and Algorithms using Java through progressive learning, coding practice, and real-world problem solving.
description: The DSA using Java workshop was conducted in three phases to provide a structured learning experience. Participants explored fundamental data structures, algorithm design, and complexity analysis through hands-on coding sessions. The workshop emphasized logical thinking, efficient problem-solving, and practical Java implementations of arrays, linked lists, stacks, queues, trees, and searching and sorting algorithms.

phases.title: Phase 1
phases.focus: Introduction to Data Structures & Java Fundamentals
